extended_help:
Cost 5 stamina per cook • No cooldown.

**Usage:**
• /cook → open menu
• /cook tier:basic|mid|late|end|dungeon → filter
• /cook recipe:[name] → instant cook

**Tiers:**
• Basic (≤35 HP)
• Mid (36-70 HP)
• Late (71-150 HP)
• End (>150 HP)
• Dungeon

Buffs do not stack. Cook before /hunt or /dungeon.
title: 🍳 Nova Kitchen
no_ingredients: 📦 No ingredients for this! Try /explore, /hunt, or /fish first.
